name: Pimberly PIM API
what_it_does: Product Information Management (PIM) platform with REST API — centralizing product data from multiple sources, enriching and validating product attributes, managing product variants and hierarchies, and syncing enriched product content to e-commerce platforms, marketplaces, and print catalogs.
use_cases: Importing raw product data from ERP and supplier feeds into Pimberly via API
Exporting enriched product catalogs to Shopify, Magento, or Amazon Marketplace
Querying product completeness scores and data quality status for operations dashboards
Automating product attribute enrichment workflows triggered by new product creation
Syncing product imagery and digital assets between DAM and PIM via API
not_for: Order management and inventory tracking (use ERP or OMS for that)
Customer data management and CDP use cases
Small retailers with fewer than 1,000 SKUs (spreadsheets may suffice)
best_when: A mid-market to enterprise retailer or brand with 1,000+ SKUs across multiple sales channels needs a central PIM to manage complex product hierarchies, variants, and channel-specific content.
avoid_when: You have a simple product catalog with few attributes, sell only on one channel, or need an open-source self-hosted PIM (use Akeneo Community Edition).

auth.notes: API key from Pimberly account settings. Passed as X-API-KEY header or Authorization header. Account-scoped access. Webhook for product create/update events. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes.

pricing.notes: UK company (Manchester). Founded 2016. Raised $25M. Strong in retail, wholesale, and manufacturing with complex product data. Real-time data syndication feature. Pre-built connectors for Shopify, Magento, WooCommerce, Amazon. Feed manager for marketplace distribution. SAP and Salesforce integration.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for products, attributes, categories, and feeds. X-API-KEY header auth. Good documentation for core product operations. Product schema must be configured in Pimberly before API data management. Attribute codes must match configured schema. Webhook for product lifecycle events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Product reads idempotent. Category reads idempotent. Product updates idempotent by product ID. Attribute reads idempotent. Product creation idempotent by SKU.
known_agent_gotchas: Product schema (attributes, categories) must be configured in Pimberly UI first
Attribute codes must exactly match configured schema — case-sensitive
Image upload is separate from product attribute update workflow
Real-time feed syndication has separate configuration from API
UK company — data residency in EU by default with US option

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU and US data residency. X-API-KEY header auth. Product data may include proprietary pricing and specifications — secure API key management. UK company with strong GDPR compliance culture.
